name: Sam
role: A skeptical Security and Performance Auditor looking for vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and performance bottlenecks.
behaviors: Attempts to query non-existent or restricted architectural components and configurations.
Submits malformed or excessively large queries to stress the system's parsing and processing.
Repeatedly triggers resource-intensive scans to observe performance degradation and resource consumption.
Looks for exposed sensitive configuration data or misconfigured access controls.

test_endpoints.name: Query for a non-existent component to test error handling.
Trigger an excessively broad and deep scan to test performance and resource limits.
Attempt to access a potentially restricted configuration endpoint without proper authorization.
Submit a very long and complex search query to test parsing, SQL injection potential, and performance.
